examples: Many of the species native to California, such as the prickly chaparral, rely on fires to propagate.
Many of the species native to California, such as the prickly chaparral , rely on fires to propagate.
Deposits of charcoal show that the chaparral-like shrub lands roamed by dinosaurs were periodically disturbed by fires.
Murdock founded the company to market the chaparral herb, which he had used to treat his cancer-stricken wife.
Johnny Murtagh confirmed his position in racing's elite with his second Derby victory, this time on High Chaparral.
